title: Payment Gateway Timeout
description: Customers reporting 504 errors when attempting to checkout using Stripe.

title: Login Loop on Mobile
description: iOS users are stuck in a redirect loop after entering correct credentials.

title: Update Documentation for API v2
description: The endpoint documentation for /users/update is missing the 'role' parameter.

title: Broken CSS on Dashboard
description: The navigation bar overlaps with the main content on screen widths below 1200px.

title: Database Optimization
description: Slow query logs indicate the 'orders' table needs new indexing.

title: Export to CSV Failing
description: The 'Export' button does nothing when the dataset exceeds 5,000 rows.

title: Password Reset Email Delay
description: Users report it takes up to 20 minutes to receive the reset link.

title: Typo in Welcome Email
description: The word 'Subscription' is misspelled in the footer.

title: Search Filter Not Persistent
description: Refreshing the page clears all active filters in the admin panel.

title: Security Vulnerability Patch
description: CVE-2026-1234 requires an immediate update to the Node.js runtime version.

title: Bulk Upload Error
description: Intermittent 400 errors when uploading more than 10 files at once.

title: Dark Mode Toggle Missing
description: The dark mode switch has disappeared from the user settings profile.
